Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

We take pride in every project. Here is what real customers have to say about working with Star Stucco of Austin.

5.0(30 reviews on Google)

“Very impressed with the communication and workmanship. The crew was courteous, kept everything clean, and completed the project faster than expected.”

Marquis Kiner

“From beginning to end the project I needed done they handled it with expert care and I am truly appreciative of the experience.”

Bella Marie

“Star Stucco Co. was amazing! Great communication, attention to detail, went above and beyond. Definitely recommend!”

Adia Yandrisovitz

“Attention to detail is something that is appreciated and this company definitely has that.”

DeShawn Skidmore-Haywood

“This is one of the most transparent and honest contractors I have been able to work with.”

Deshawn Skidmore

“10/10 recommend this company! Excellent communication skills and great with their clients.”

Bryanna Rodriguez

“Best contractors in the state. They are so attentive to detail, they deserve every single applause.”

Riasha Mariam

“They did such a good job for my friend. Definitely going to them for myself next, and they were so nice and understanding when helping.”

Nayeli Alfaro

“Amazing service, best in Austin for sure.”

Daniel Moreno

“One of the best stuccos I have ever used. Easy to use, easy to buy, and came in the mail very quick.”

Robert Cortez

“Had some worries whenever I went with them but one of the best decisions I ever made buying this stucco.”

Manda Panda

“Great company overall, looking forward to referring them to other friends.”

“Really great company, definitely will be patronizing them in the future.”

“They are great. Fast, friendly, and they do the best work in town.”

“Great service! 10/10.”

“Great place. Really good hospitality.”

Integrity · Commitment · Quality

Stucco and plaster contractor serving Central Texas with over 9,000 projects completed. Residential stucco, commercial stucco, EIFS, interior plaster, and stone veneer.
